case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $1723.00 U.S. et al

docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION:  $1723.00 U.S. CURRENCY DOES 1 THROUGH 100 INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-14-2009 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

DISCOVERY 610, PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION FOR ORDER FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS AND STRIKING CLAIM GRANTED, THE CLAIM OF MAURICE STEUBEN SHALL BE STRICKEN. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT FORM OF ORDER. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. NOT REPORTED.
ORDER COMPELLING ANSWERS TO FIRST SET OF DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS; FIRST SET OF FORM INTERROGATORIES; FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES
MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-10-2008 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

DISCOVERY 610, PETITIONER'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM AND SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. CLAIMANT IS ORDERED TO SERVE COMPLETE VERIFIED RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTIONS AND PRODUCE DOCUMENTS WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE CHAN. NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim; P/A; Declaration Of Pamela A. Underwood In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Oct-14-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. Petitioner People of the State of California's Motion for order for terminating sanctions and striking claim granted, the claim of Maurice Steuben shall be stricken. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner'S First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioners' First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Sep-10-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearance:
PAMELA A. UNDERWOOD, ASSISTANT DISTRICT ATTORNEY, (415)551-9544, FOR THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
NO OTHER APPEARANCES WERE MADE

TENTATIVE RULING WAS ADOPTED AS FOLLOWS: Petitioner's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Claimant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections and produce documents within 15 days of notice of this order. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported. (610/BEC)
